title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 저쪽에 쌓여 있는 벽돌도 날라야 합니까?
나: 아니요. 저쪽 것은 다른 곳으로 가져가야 해요. 이쪽에 있는 벽돌만 옮겨 주시면 돼요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Tôi có phải mang cả những viên gạch chồng lên ở đó không?
B: Không. Cái đó phải mang tới một nơi khác. Bạn chỉ cần di chuyển các viên gạch ở đây.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: Devo portare anche i mattoni ammucchiati laggiù?
B: No. Quella deve essere portata altrove. Devi solo spostare i mattoni su questo lato.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
A : Dois-je également transporter les briques empilées là-bas ?
B : Non. Celui-là doit être emmené ailleurs. Il vous suffit de déplacer les briques de ce côté.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
A: ¿Tengo que llevar los ladrillos apilados allí también?
B: No. Ese hay que llevarlo a otra parte. Solo necesitas mover los ladrillos de este lado.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Apakah saya juga harus membawa tumpukan batu bata ke sana?
B: Tidak. Yang itu harus dibawa ke tempat lain. Anda hanya perlu memindahkan batu bata di sisi ini.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
A:あそこに積み上げたレンガも運ばなきゃいけないの？
B: いいえ。それは別の場所に持って行かなければなりません。こちら側のレンガを移動するだけです。

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
A: Muss ich die aufgetürmten Ziegel auch dort drüben tragen?
B: Nein. Das muss woanders gemacht werden. Sie müssen nur die Steine ​​​​auf dieser Seite verschieben.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
A: 堆在那边的砖头是不是也得搬过来？
B: 不行，那只得带到别处去。你只需要移动这边的砖块。

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
A: 堆在那邊的磚頭是不是也得搬過來？
B: 不行，那隻得帶到別處去。你只需要移動這邊的磚塊。

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
А: Мне тоже придется нести туда сложенные кирпичи?
Б: Нет. Это нужно взять в другом месте. Вам просто нужно переместить кирпичи на этой стороне.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
A: ต้องแบกอิฐที่กองไว้ตรงนั้นด้วยหรือเปล่า?
B: ไม่ อันนั้นต้องเอาไปที่อื่น คุณเพียงแค่ต้องย้ายอิฐที่อยู่ด้านนี้

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
A: Tenho que carregar os tijolos empilhados ali também?
B: Não. Esse tem que ser levado para outro lugar. Você só precisa mover os tijolos deste lado.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
उत्तर: क्या मुझे वहां पर ढेर की गई ईंटों को भी ले जाना होगा?
बी: नहीं, उसे कहीं और ले जाना होगा। आपको बस ईंटों को इस तरफ ले जाने की जरूरत है।

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
C: Oraya yığılmış tuğlaları da mı taşımam gerekiyor?
B: Hayır. Bunun başka bir yere götürülmesi gerekiyor. Bu taraftaki tuğlaları hareket ettirmeniz yeterli.

#######

A: Do I have to carry the bricks piled up over there as well?
B: No. That one has to be taken elsewhere. You just need to move the bricks on this side.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: के मैले त्यहाँ थुप्रिएको इँटाहरू पनि बोक्नुपर्छ?
B: होइन, त्यो अर्को ठाउँमा लैजानुपर्छ। तपाईलाई यो छेउमा ईंटहरू सार्न आवश्यक छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ចម្លើយ៖ តើ​ខ្ញុំ​ត្រូវ​យក​ឥដ្ឋ​ដែល​គរ​នៅ​ទីនោះ​ដែរ​ឬ​ទេ?
ខ៖ អត់ទេ នោះត្រូវយកទៅកន្លែងផ្សេង។ អ្នកគ្រាន់តែត្រូវការផ្លាស់ទីឥដ្ឋនៅខាងនេះ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
පිළිතුර:- එතනත් ගොඩගසා තිබෙන ගඩොල් රැගෙන යා යුතුද?
ආ.. නෑ ඒක වෙන තැනකට ගෙනියන්න වෙනවා. ඔබ මේ පැත්තේ ගඩොල් ගෙනයාමට අවශ්යයි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উত্তর: আমাকে কি সেখানে স্তূপ করা ইটগুলোও বহন করতে হবে?
বি: না। এটাকে অন্য কোথাও নিয়ে যেতে হবে। আপনি শুধু এই দিকে ইট সরাতে হবে।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
ဖြေ။ ဟိုမှာ အုတ်တွေစုထားရမလား။
B: မဟုတ်ဘူး၊ အဲဒါကို တခြားနေရာမှာ ယူရမယ်။ ဒီဘက်ခြမ်းက အုတ်တွေကို ရွှေ့ဖို့ပဲလိုတယ်။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 바람이 많이 부는데 문 좀 닫아 주시겠어요?
남자: 네, 닫아 드릴게요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Trời gió mạnh quá, bạn có thể đóng cửa lại giúp tôi được không?
Nam: Vâng, tôi sẽ đóng cho.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: C'è molto vento. Potresti chiudere la porta?
Uomo: OK, lo chiudo.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Il y a beaucoup de vent. Pourriez-vous fermer la porte ?
Homme : OK, je vais le fermer.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: Hace mucho viento. ¿Podrías cerrar la puerta?
Hombre: Está bien, lo cerraré.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Cuacanya sangat berangin. Bisakah kamu menutup pintunya?
Pria: Oke, saya akan menutupnya.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性：とても風が強いですね。ドアを閉めてもらえますか？
男性: わかりました、閉めます。

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Es ist sehr windig. Könnten Sie die Tür schließen?
Mann: OK, ich schließe es.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：风很大。你能把门关上吗？
男：好的，我把它关了。

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：風很大。你能把門關上嗎？
男：好的，我把它關了。

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Очень ветрено. Не могли бы вы закрыть дверь?
Мужчина: Хорошо, я закрою.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: ลมแรงมาก คุณช่วยปิดประตูได้ไหม?
ผู้ชาย : โอเค ฉันจะปิดมันแล้ว

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Está ventando muito. Você poderia fechar a porta?
Homem: OK, vou fechar.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: बहुत तेज़ हवा है. क्या आप दरवाज़ा बंद कर सकते हैं?
आदमी: ठीक है, मैं इसे बंद कर दूंगा।

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Çok rüzgarlı. Kapıyı kapatabilir misin?
Adam: Tamam kapatıyorum.

#######

Woman: It's very windy. Could you close the door?
Man: OK, I'll close it.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
महिला: धेरै हावा चलेको छ। के तपाईं ढोका बन्द गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ?
मान्छे: ठीक छ, म यसलाई बन्द गर्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ ខ្យល់ខ្លាំង។ តើអ្នកអាចបិទទ្វារបានទេ?
បុរស៖ យល់ព្រម ខ្ញុំនឹងបិទវា។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: හොඳටම හුළං. ඔබට දොර වසා ගත හැකිද?
මිනිසා: හරි, මම එය වසා දමමි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলাঃ খুব ঝোড়ো হাওয়া। আপনি কি দরজা বন্ধ করতে পারেন?
মানুষ: ঠিক আছে, আমি এটা বন্ধ করব.
g_text_audio_translate.my:
အမျိုးသမီး : လေအရမ်းတိုက်တယ်။ တံခါးကိုပိတ်လို့ရမလား
Man: အိုကေ၊ ငါပိတ်လိုက်မယ်။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
가: 저기, 모하메드씨 이쪽으로 와서 같이 그물을 좀 끌어올려요. 
나: 네. 아이고. 그 그물에 멸치가 꽤 많이 걸렸나봐요. 굉장히 무겁네요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
A: Này, Mohammed, lại đây cùng kéo lưới lên đi.
B: Vâng. Trời ơi. Có vẻ có khá nhiều cá cơm mắc lưới. Nặng thật.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
A: Ehi, Mohammed, vieni qui e tira su la rete.
B: OK. Oh mio. Ci devono essere molte acciughe nella rete. È molto pesante.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
R : Hé, Mohammed, viens ici et lève le filet ensemble.
B : D’accord. Oh mon. Il doit y avoir beaucoup d'anchois dans le filet. C'est très lourd.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
R: Oye, Mohammed, ven aquí y levanten la red juntos.
B: Está bien. Oh mi. Debe haber muchas anchoas en la red. Es muy pesado.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
A: Hei, Mohammed, kemarilah dan tarik jaringnya bersama-sama.
B: Oke. Astaga. Pasti banyak ikan teri di jaring. Ini sangat berat.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
A: おい、モハメッド、こっちに来て一緒に網を引き上げろ。
B: わかりました。ああ、なんと。網にはカタクチイワシがたくさんあるはずだ。とても重いです。

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
A: Hey, Mohammed, komm her und ziehe gemeinsam das Netz hoch.
B: Okay. Oh mein. Es müssen viele Sardellen im Netz sein. Es ist sehr schwer.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
A：嘿，穆罕默德，过来，一起拉网。
乙：好的。天啊。网里肯定有很多凤尾鱼。它很重。

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
A：嘿，穆罕默德，過來，一起拉網。
乙：好的。天啊。網里肯定有很多鳳尾魚。它很重。

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
A: Эй, Мохаммед, подойди сюда и вместе вытащи сеть.
Б: Хорошо. О боже. В сети должно быть много анчоусов. Это очень тяжело.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ตอบ: เฮ้ โมฮัมเหม็ด มานี่แล้วดึงตาข่ายขึ้นมาด้วยกัน
บี: โอเค. พุทโธ่. จะต้องมีปลาแอนโชวี่อยู่ในตาข่ายเป็นจำนวนมาก มันหนักมาก

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
R: Ei, Mohammed, venha aqui e puxem a rede juntos.
B: OK. Oh meu Deus. Deve haver muitas anchovas na rede. É muito pesado.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
उत्तर: अरे, मोहम्मद, यहाँ आओ और एक साथ जाल खींचो।
बी: ठीक है. अरे बाप रे। नेट में ढेर सारी एंकोवीज़ होनी चाहिए. यह बहुत भारी है.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
C: Hey Muhammed, buraya gel ve birlikte ağı çek.
B: Tamam. Aman. Ağda çok fazla hamsi olmalı. Çok ağır.

#######

A: Hey, Mohammed, come over here and pull up the net together.
B: OK. Oh my. There must be a lot of anchovies in the net. It's very heavy.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
A: हे, मोहम्मद, यहाँ आउनुहोस् र सँगै जाल तान्नुहोस्।
B: ठीक छ। बाफरे। नेटमा धेरै एन्कोभिजहरू हुनुपर्छ। यो धेरै भारी छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
A: ហេ Mohammed មកទីនេះ ហើយទាញសំណាញ់ជាមួយគ្នា។
ខ៖ យល់ព្រម។ អូរបស់ខ្ញុំ។ ត្រូវតែមាន anchovies ច្រើននៅក្នុងសំណាញ់។ វាធ្ងន់ណាស់។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
ආ මොහොමඩ් මෙහාට ඇවිත් එකට දැල උස්සන්න.
B: හරි. අනේ මන්දා. නෙට් එකේ නැංගුරම් ගොඩක් තියෙන්න ඇති. එය ඉතා බරයි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
উত্তর: আরে, মোহাম্মদ, এখানে এসে একসাথে জাল টান।
বি: ঠিক আছে। আহারে. নেটে প্রচুর অ্যাঙ্কোভিস থাকতে হবে। এটা খুব ভারী.
g_text_audio_translate.my:
A: ဟေး မိုဟာမက်၊ ဒီကိုလာပြီး ပိုက်ကွန်ကို အတူတူဆွဲပါ။
B: အိုကေ။ အိုး ငါ့။ ပိုက်ကွန်ထဲမှာ anchovies တွေအများကြီးရှိရမယ်။ အရမ်းလေးတယ်။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 죄송하지만 문 좀 열어 주시겠어요? 짐이 많아서요.
여자: 네, 열어 드릴게요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi xin lỗi, nhưng bạn có thể mở cửa cho tôi được không? Tôi có rất nhiều hành lý quá.
Nữ: Vâng, tôi sẽ mở cho.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Mi dispiace, ma potresti aprire la porta? Ho molti bagagli.
Donna: Sì, te lo apro.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Je suis désolé, mais pourriez-vous ouvrir la porte ? J'ai beaucoup de bagages.
Femme : Oui, je vais l'ouvrir pour vous.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Lo siento, pero ¿podrías abrir la puerta? Tengo mucho equipaje.
Mujer: Sí, te la abriré.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Maaf, bisakah kamu membuka pintunya? Saya punya banyak barang bawaan.
Wanita: Ya, saya akan membukakannya untuk Anda.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: 申し訳ありませんが、ドアを開けていただけますか?荷物がたくさんあります。
女性: はい、開けさせていただきます。

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Es tut mir leid, aber könnten Sie die Tür öffnen? Ich habe viel Gepäck.
Frau: Ja, ich öffne es für dich.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：对不起，你能开门吗？我有很多行李。
女：是的，我给你打开。

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：對不起，你能開門嗎？我有很多行李。
女：是的，我給你打開。

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Извините, но не могли бы вы открыть дверь? У меня много багажа.
Женщина: Да, я тебе открою.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย : ขอโทษนะ แต่ช่วยเปิดประตูหน่อยได้ไหม? ฉันมีสัมภาระเยอะมาก
ผู้หญิง : ค่ะ ฉันจะเปิดให้คุณ

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Me desculpe, mas você poderia abrir a porta? Eu tenho muita bagagem.
Mulher: Sim, vou abrir para você.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: मुझे क्षमा करें, लेकिन क्या आप दरवाज़ा खोल सकते हैं? मेरे पास बहुत सारा सामान है.
महिला: हाँ, मैं इसे तुम्हारे लिए खोल दूंगी।

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Özür dilerim ama kapıyı açabilir misiniz? Bir sürü bagajım var.
Kadın: Evet, sizin için açacağım.

#######

Man: I'm sorry, but could you open the door? I have a lot of luggage.
Woman: Yes, I'll open it for you.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मानिस: मलाई माफ गर्नुहोस्, तर के तपाइँ ढोका खोल्न सक्नुहुन्छ? मसँग धेरै सामान छ।
महिला: हो, म तिम्रो लागि खोल्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ ខ្ញុំសុំទោស ប៉ុន្តែតើអ្នកអាចបើកទ្វារបានទេ? ខ្ញុំ​មាន​អីវ៉ាន់​ច្រើន។
ស្ត្រី៖ បាទ ខ្ញុំនឹងបើកវាឱ្យអ្នក។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: මට සමාවෙන්න, නමුත් ඔබට දොර අරින්න පුළුවන්ද? මට බඩු ගොඩක් තියෙනවා.
කාන්තාව: ඔව්, මම එය ඔබට විවෘත කරන්නම්.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মানুষ: আমি দুঃখিত, কিন্তু আপনি দরজা খুলতে পারেন? আমার অনেক লাগেজ আছে।
মহিলা: হ্যাঁ, আমি আপনার জন্য এটি খুলব।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man : တောင်းပန်ပါတယ် ဒါပေမယ့် မင်း တံခါးဖွင့်လို့ရမလား။ ငါ့မှာ ခရီးဆောင်အိတ်တွေ အများကြီးရှိတယ်။
အမျိုးသမီး : ဟုတ်တယ်၊ မင်းအတွက် ငါဖွင့်မယ်။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 오늘 김치 담그는 날인거 아시죠? 우선 채소 다듬는 것부터 시작하세요.
여자: 네, 그럼 제가 배추를 씻어서 소금으로 절일게요. 리아 씨 이리 와서 파를 좀 다듬어주시겠어요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Bạn biết hôm nay là ngày làm kim chi đúng không? Hãy bắt đầu bằng việc cắt tỉa rau trước.
Nữ: Được rồi, tôi sẽ rửa bắp cải và muối nó. Lia, bạn có thể đến cắt một ít hành lá được không?
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Lo sai che oggi è il giorno della preparazione del kimchi, vero? Iniziate tagliando le verdure.
Donna: Sì, poi lavo il cavolo e lo sale. Lia, puoi venire qui a tagliare le cipolle verdi?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Vous savez qu'aujourd'hui, c'est le jour de la fabrication du kimchi, n'est-ce pas ? Commencez par couper les légumes.
Femme : Oui, alors je vais laver le chou et le saler. Lia, tu peux venir ici et couper les oignons verts ?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Sabes que hoy es el día de hacer kimchi, ¿verdad? Empiece por recortar las verduras.
Mujer: Sí, luego lavaré el repollo y le pondré sal. Lia, ¿puedes venir aquí y cortar las cebolletas?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Kamu tahu hari ini adalah hari pembuatan kimchi, kan? Mulailah dengan memangkas sayuran.
Wanita: Ya, kalau begitu saya akan mencuci kubis dan memberi garam. Lia, bisakah kamu kemari dan memotong daun bawangnya?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: 今日はキムチ作りの日だよね？まずは野菜を切ることから始めます。
女性: はい、それではキャベツを洗って塩をします。リア、ここに来てネギを切ってもらえますか？

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Du weißt, dass heute der Tag der Kimchi-Zubereitung ist, oder? Beginnen Sie mit dem Schneiden des Gemüses.
Frau: Ja, dann wasche ich den Kohl und salze ihn. Lia, kannst du herkommen und die Frühlingszwiebeln schneiden?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：你知道今天是泡菜日，对吧？首先修剪蔬菜。
女：是的，那我把白菜洗一下，加盐。莉亚，你能过来切一下葱吗？

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：你知道今天是泡菜日，對吧？首先修剪蔬菜。
女：是的，那我把白菜洗一下，加鹽。莉亞，你能過來切一下蔥嗎？

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Ты ведь знаешь, что сегодня день приготовления кимчи, да? Начнем с нарезки овощей.
Женщина: Да, тогда я капусту вымою и посолю. Лия, ты можешь прийти сюда и порезать зеленый лук?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: คุณรู้ไหมว่าวันนี้เป็นวันทำกิมจิใช่ไหม? เริ่มต้นด้วยการตัดแต่งผัก
ผู้หญิง: ค่ะ ฉันจะล้างกะหล่ำปลีใส่เกลือ ลีอา คุณมาที่นี่เพื่อเล็มต้นหอมได้ไหม?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Você sabe que hoje é dia de fazer kimchi, certo? Comece cortando os legumes.
Mulher: Sim, então vou lavar o repolho e salgar. Lia, você pode vir aqui cortar a cebolinha?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: तुम्हें पता है कि आज किमची बनाने का दिन है, है ना? सब्जियों को ट्रिम करके शुरुआत करें।
महिला: हां, तो मैं गोभी को धो कर नमक लगा दूंगी. लिया, क्या तुम यहाँ आ सकती हो और हरे प्याज काट सकती हो?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Bugünün kimchi yapma günü olduğunu biliyorsun değil mi? Sebzeleri keserek başlayın.
Kadın: Evet, sonra lahanayı yıkayıp tuzlayacağım. Lia, buraya gelip yeşil soğanları kesebilir misin?

#######

Man: You know today is kimchi-making day, right?  Start by trimming the vegetables.
Woman: Yes, then I'll wash the cabbage and salt it. Lia, can you come here and trim the green onions?
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मानिस: तपाईलाई थाहा छ आज किम्ची बनाउने दिन हो, हैन? तरकारी काटेर सुरु गर्नुहोस्।
महिला: हो, त्यसोभए म बन्दकोबी धोएर नुन दिन्छु। लिया, के तपाईं यहाँ आउन सक्नुहुन्छ र हरियो प्याज ट्रिम गर्न सक्नुहुन्छ?
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ អ្នកដឹងទេថាថ្ងៃនេះជាថ្ងៃធ្វើគីមឈីមែនទេ? ចាប់ផ្តើមដោយកាត់បន្លែ។
ស្ត្រី៖ បាទ ខ្ញុំនឹងលាងស្ពៃក្តោប ហើយអំបិលវា។ Lia តើអ្នកអាចមកទីនេះដើម្បីកាត់ខ្ទឹមបារាំងបានទេ?
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: ඔබ දන්නවා අද කිම්චි හදන දවස නේද? එළවළු කප්පාදු කිරීමෙන් ආරම්භ කරන්න.
කාන්තාව: ඔව් එහෙනම් මම ගෝවා සෝදා ලුණු දමමි. ලියා, ඔයාට මෙහෙ ඇවිත් අමු ළූණු කපන්න පුළුවන්ද?
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মানুষ: তুমি জানো আজ কিমচি তৈরির দিন, তাই না? সবজি ছাঁটাই করে শুরু করুন।
মহিলা: হ্যাঁ, তাহলে আমি বাঁধাকপি ধুয়ে লবণ দেব। লিয়া, তুমি কি এখানে এসে সবুজ পেঁয়াজ কাটতে পারবে?
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man : ဒီနေ့က ကင်မ်ချီလုပ်တဲ့နေ့ဆိုတာ မင်းသိတယ်မဟုတ်လား အသီးအရွက်များကို လှီးဖြတ်ခြင်းဖြင့် စတင်ပါ။
အမျိုးသမီး : ဟုတ်ကဲ့ ဒါဆို ကျွန်တော် ဂေါ်ဖီထုပ်ကို ရေဆေးပြီး ဆားလုပ်လိုက်မယ်။ Lia၊ မင်းဒီကိုလာပြီး ကြက်သွန်နီကို လှီးဖြတ်လို့ရလား။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 민수 씨는 언제 한국에 왔어요?
남자: 7월 20일에 왔어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Minsu đến Hàn Quốc khi nào?
Nam: Tôi đến vào ngày 20 tháng 7.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Quando sei venuto in Corea, Minsu?
Uomo: Sono arrivato il 20 luglio.

#######

Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Quand es-tu venue en Corée, Minsu ?
Homme : Je suis arrivé le 20 juillet.

#######

Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Cuándo viniste a Corea, Minsu?
Hombre: Llegué el 20 de julio.

#######

Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Kapan kamu datang ke Korea, Minsu?
Pria: Saya tiba pada tanggal 20 Juli.

#######

Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: ミンス、いつ韓国に来たの?
男性: 7 月 20 日に到着しました。

#######

Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Wann bist du nach Korea gekommen, Minsu?
Mann: Ich bin am 20. Juli angekommen.

#######

Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：敏秀，你什么时候来韩国的？
男：我是7月20号到的。

#######

Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：敏秀，你什麼時候來韓國的？
男：我是7月20號到的。

#######

Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Когда ты приехал в Корею, Минсу?
Мужчина: Я приехал 20 июля.

#######

Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: คุณมาเกาหลีเมื่อไหร่คะ มินซู?
ผู้ชาย: ฉันมาถึงเมื่อวันที่ 20 กรกฎาคม

#######

Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Quando você veio para a Coreia, Minsu?
Homem: Cheguei no dia 20 de julho.

#######

Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: मिंसु, तुम कोरिया कब आये?
आदमी: मैं 20 जुलाई को आया था।

#######

Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Kore'ye ne zaman geldin Minsu?
Adam: 20 Temmuz'da geldim.

#######

Woman: When did you come to Korea, Minsu?
Man: I arrived on July 20th.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
केटी: मिनसु, तपाई कोरिया कहिले आउनुभयो?
मानिस: म जुलाई २० मा आइपुगेको छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
នារី៖ តើអូនមកកូរ៉េនៅពេលណា?
បុរស៖ ខ្ញុំបានមកដល់ថ្ងៃទី ២០ ខែកក្កដា។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
ගැහැනිය: මින්සු ඔයා කොරියට ආවෙ කවද්ද?
මිනිසා: මම ජූලි 20 වෙනිදා ආවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলাঃ তুমি কোরিয়ায় কবে এসেছ, মিনসু?
মানুষ: আমি 20শে জুলাই এসেছি।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Woman: မင်းဘယ်တုန်းက ကိုရီးယားကို လာတာလဲ Minsu
Man : ကျွန်တော် ဇူလိုင် 20 ရက်မှာ ရောက်တယ်။

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 안전 교육은 몇 시부터 시작해요?
남자: 11시 20분에 시작해요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Giáo dục an toàn bắt đầu lúc mấy giờ?
Nam: Nó bắt đầu lúc 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: A che ora inizia la formazione sulla sicurezza?
Uomo: Inizia alle 11:20.

#######

Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : À quelle heure commence la formation sur la sécurité ?
Homme : Ça commence à 11h20.

#######

Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿A qué hora empieza el entrenamiento de seguridad?
Hombre: Comienza a las 11:20.

#######

Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Jam berapa pelatihan keselamatan dimulai?
Pria: Ini dimulai pada 11:20.

#######

Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: 安全訓練は何時に始まりますか?
男性: 11:20から始まります。

#######

Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Um wie viel Uhr beginnt das Sicherheitstraining?
Mann: Es beginnt um 11:20 Uhr.

#######

Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：安全培训什么时候开始？
男：11点20分开始。

#######

Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：安全培訓什麼時候開始？
男：11點20分開始。

#######

Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Во сколько начинается обучение технике безопасности?
Мужчина: Начало в 11:20.

#######

Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
หญิง: การฝึกอบรมด้านความปลอดภัยเริ่มกี่โมง?
ผู้ชาย : เริ่มเวลา 11.20 น.

#######

Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: A que horas começa o treinamento de segurança?
Homem: Começa às 11h20.

#######

Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: सुरक्षा प्रशिक्षण कितने बजे शुरू होता है?
आदमी: यह 11:20 पर शुरू होता है.

#######

Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Güvenlik eğitimi saat kaçta başlıyor?
Adam: 11:20'de başlıyor.

#######

Woman: What time does the safety training start?
Man: It starts at 11:20.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
महिला: सुरक्षा तालिम कति बजे सुरु हुन्छ?
मानिस: यो 11:20 मा सुरु हुन्छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ តើវគ្គបណ្តុះបណ្តាលសុវត្ថិភាពចាប់ផ្តើមម៉ោងប៉ុន្មាន?
បុរស: វាចាប់ផ្តើមនៅម៉ោង 11:20 ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: ආරක්ෂිත පුහුණුව ආරම්භ වන්නේ කීයටද?
මිනිසා: එය 11:20 ට ආරම්භ වේ.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলা: নিরাপত্তা প্রশিক্ষণ কয়টায় শুরু হয়?
মানুষ: এটা শুরু হয় 11:20 এ।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
အမျိုးသမီး- ဘေးကင်းရေးသင်တန်းက ဘယ်နှနာရီစမလဲ။
Man: 11:20 မှာစတယ်။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 안전 교육은 언제 해요?
남자: 오후 4시부터 5시까지 해요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Khi nào diễn ra giáo dục an toàn?
Nam: Từ 4 giờ chiều đến 5 giờ chiều.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Quando c'è la formazione sulla sicurezza?
Uomo: Sono le 16:00. alle 17:00

#######

Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Femme : Quand a lieu la formation sur la sécurité ?
Homme : C'est à partir de 16h. à 17 heures

#######

Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Mujer: ¿Cuándo es el entrenamiento de seguridad?
Hombre: Es a partir de las 4 p.m. a 5 p. m.

#######

Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Wanita: Kapan pelatihan keselamatannya?
Pria: Ini dari jam 4 sore. sampai jam 5 sore.

#######

Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
女性: 安全訓練はいつ行われますか?
男性：午後４時からですよ。午後5時まで

#######

Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Frau: Wann ist das Sicherheitstraining?
Mann: Es ist ab 16 Uhr. bis 17 Uhr

#######

Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
女：安全培训什么时候进行？
男：下午 4 点开始。至下午 5 点

#######

Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
女：安全培訓什麼時候進行？
男：下午 4 點開始。至下午 5 點

#######

Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Женщина: Когда тренинг по технике безопасности?
Мужчина: Это с 16:00. до 17:00

#######

Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้หญิง: อบรมด้านความปลอดภัยเมื่อไหร่?
ผู้ชาย: ตั้งแต่ 4 โมงเย็นเป็นต้นไป ถึง 17.00 น.

#######

Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Mulher: Quando é o treinamento de segurança?
Homem: É a partir das 16h. às 17h

#######

Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
महिला: सुरक्षा प्रशिक्षण कब है?
आदमी: शाम के 4 बजे हैं. शाम 5 बजे तक

#######

Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Kadın: Güvenlik eğitimi ne zaman?
Adam: Saat 4'ten itibaren. akşam 5'e kadar

#######

Woman: When is the safety training?
Man: It's from 4 p.m. to 5 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
महिला: सुरक्षा तालिम कहिले हुन्छ?
मान्छे: बेलुकीको ४ बजेको हो 5 बजे सम्म
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ តើការបណ្តុះបណ្តាលសុវត្ថិភាពនៅពេលណា?
បុរស៖ ចាប់ពីម៉ោង ៤ រសៀល។ ដល់ម៉ោង 5 ល្ងាច
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: ආරක්ෂිත පුහුණුව කවදාද?
මිනිහා: හවස 4 ඉඳන්. 5 දක්වා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলা: নিরাপত্তা প্রশিক্ষণ কখন?
লোক: এটা বিকাল 4 টা থেকে বিকাল ৫টা থেকে
g_text_audio_translate.my:
အမျိုးသမီး- လုံခြုံရေးသင်တန်းက ဘယ်အချိန်လဲ။
ယောက်ျား : ညနေ ၄ နာရီမှ ညနေ ၅ နာရီအထိ

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 어머! 다리가 왜 그래요?
남자: 어제 계단에서 넘어져서 다쳤어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Ôi trời! Chân của bạn bị sao vậy?
Nam: Tôi bị ngã cầu thang ngày hôm qua nên bị thương.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Oh my! What's wrong with your legs?
Man: I fell down the stairs and got hurt yesterday.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Oh mio Dio! Cosa c'è che non va nelle tue gambe?
Uomo: Ieri sono caduto dalle scale e mi sono fatto male.

#######

Woman: Oh my! What's wrong with your legs?
Man: I fell down the stairs and got hurt yesterday.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Homme : Je suis tombé dans les escaliers et je me suis blessé hier.

#######

Woman: Oh my! What's wrong with your legs?
Man: I fell down the stairs and got hurt yesterday.
g_text_audio_translate.es:

Hombre: Ayer me caí por las escaleras y me lastimé.

#######

Man: I fell down the stairs and got hurt yesterday.
g_text_audio_translate.id:

Pria: Saya terjatuh dari tangga dan terluka kemarin.

#######

Man: I fell down the stairs and got hurt yesterday.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:

男性: 昨日、階段から落ちて怪我をしました。

Man: I fell down the stairs and got hurt yesterday.

Mann: Ich bin gestern die Treppe hinuntergefallen und habe mich verletzt.

#######

Woman: Oh my! What's wrong with your legs?
Man: I fell down the stairs and got hurt yesterday.

男：我昨天从楼梯上摔下来受伤了。

#######

Woman: Oh my! What's wrong with your legs?

g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:

Woman: Oh my! What's wrong with your legs?

g_text_audio_translate.ne:

g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ អូ! តើជើងរបស់អ្នកមានបញ្ហាអ្វី?
បុរស៖ ខ្ញុំបានធ្លាក់ពីលើជណ្តើរហើយបានរងរបួសកាលពីម្សិលមិញ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: අපොයි! ඔබේ කකුල් වල ඇති වැරැද්ද කුමක්ද?
මිනිසා: ඊයේ පඩිපෙලෙන් වැටිලා තුවාල වුණා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলাঃ ওহ আমার! আপনার পায়ে সমস্যা কি?
লোক: আমি গতকাল সিঁড়ি থেকে পড়ে গিয়ে আঘাত পেয়েছিলাম।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
မိန်းမ: အိုး ငါ့! မင်းခြေထောက်တွေ ဘာဖြစ်နေတာလဲ။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 다 됐습니다. 어떠세요? 거울 한번 보세요.
여자: 길이도 괜찮고 파마도 잘 된 것 같아요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Xong rồi ạ. Quý khách thấy thế nào? Hãy nhìn vào gương đi ạ.
Nữ: Độ dài cũng ổn, phần uốn cũng đẹp lắm.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: E' fatta. Cosa ne pensi? Dai un'occhiata allo specchio.
Donna: La lunghezza va bene e penso che anche la permanente sia venuta bene.

#######

Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : C’est fait. Qu'en penses-tu? Regarde dans le miroir.
Femme : La longueur est correcte, et je pense que la permanente s'est bien déroulée aussi.

#######

Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Está hecho. ¿Qué opinas? Mírate en el espejo.
Mujer: El largo está bien y creo que la permanente también quedó bien.

#######

Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Sudah selesai. Bagaimana menurutmu? Lihatlah ke cermin.
Wanita: Panjangnya oke, dan menurutku hasil pengeritingannya juga bagus.

#######

Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: 終わったよ。どう思いますか？鏡を見てください。
女性：長さも大丈夫ですし、パーマもよく出ていると思います。

#######

Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Es ist geschafft. Was denken Sie? Schau in den Spiegel.
Frau: Die Länge ist in Ordnung und die Dauerwelle finde ich auch gut gelungen.

#######

Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：已经完成了。你怎么认为？照照镜子吧。
女：长度还可以，我觉得烫发效果也不错。

#######

Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：已經完成了。你怎麼認為？照照鏡子吧。
女：長度還可以，我覺得燙髮效果也不錯。

#######

Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Готово. Что вы думаете? Посмотрите в зеркало.
Женщина: Длина нормальная, и завивка, думаю, тоже получилась удачной.

#######

Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย : เสร็จแล้วครับ คุณคิดอย่างไร? ลองดูในกระจก
ผู้หญิง: ความยาวก็โอเคนะ และฉันก็คิดว่าการดัดผมก็ออกมาดีเหมือนกัน

#######

Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Está feito. O que você acha? Dê uma olhada no espelho.
Mulher: O comprimento está bom e acho que o permanente também ficou bom.

#######

Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: हो गया. आप क्या सोचते हैं? दर्पण में देखो.
महिला: लंबाई ठीक है, और मुझे लगता है कि पर्म भी अच्छा निकला है।

#######

Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Bitti. Ne düşünüyorsun? Aynaya bir bak.
Kadın: Uzunluğu iyi, ayrıca permanın da iyi sonuç verdiğini düşünüyorum.

#######

Man: It's done. What do you think? Take a look in the mirror.
Woman: The length is okay, and I think the perm came out well, too.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मान्छे: सकियो। तिम्रो के बिचार छ? ऐनामा हेर।
महिला: लम्बाइ ठीक छ, र मलाई लाग्छ पर्म पनि राम्रोसँग बाहिर आयो।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ រួចរាល់ហើយ។ តើ​អ្នក​គិត​អ្វី? សូមក្រឡេកមើលកញ្ចក់។
ស្ត្រី៖ ប្រវែងមិនអីទេ ហើយខ្ញុំគិតថា perm ចេញមកល្អផងដែរ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: ඒක ඉවරයි. ඔයා සිතන්නේ කුමක් ද? කැඩපත දෙස බලන්න.
කාන්තාව: දිග හරි, මම හිතන්නේ පර්ම් එකත් හොඳට ආවා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
লোক: হয়ে গেছে। আপনি কি মনে করেন? আয়নায় একবার দেখুন।
মহিলা: দৈর্ঘ্য ঠিক আছে, এবং আমি মনে করি পার্মটিও ভালভাবে বেরিয়ে এসেছে।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man: ပြီးပြီ။ သင်ဘယ်လိုထင်ပါလဲ? မှန်ထဲမှာ ကြည့်ပါ။
အမျိုးသမီး : အရှည်က အဆင်ပြေတယ် ၊ perm လည်း ကောင်းတယ်လို့ ထင်ပါတယ်။

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 공장 점심시간이 어떻게 돼요?
남자: 12시부터 1시까지예요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:

Nam: Từ 12:00 đến 1:00.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: What's the lunch time at the factory?
Man: It's from 12:00 to 1:00.
g_text_audio_translate.it:

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 이 물건을 네팔로 보낼 거예요. 요금이 많이 나올까요?

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Tôi muốn gửi thứ này đến Nepal. Phí có mắc không nhỉ?
Nam: Trước tiên cô hãy đặt cái hộp lên cân nhé. Chi phí được quyết định theo trọng lượng.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: I want to send this to Nepal. Will it cost a lot?
Man: Please put the box on the scale first. The fare is determined by the weight.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Voglio mandarlo in Nepal. Costerà molto?
Uomo: Per favore, metti prima la scatola sulla bilancia. La tariffa è determinata dal peso.

Man: Please put the box on the scale first. The fare is determined by the weight.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:

Homme : S'il vous plaît, mettez d'abord la boîte sur la balance. Le tarif est déterminé par le poids.

#######

Woman: I want to send this to Nepal. Will it cost a lot?

आदमी: कृपया पहले बॉक्स को तराजू पर रखें। किराया वजन के हिसाब से तय होता है.

g_text_audio_translate.ne:

मानिस: कृपया पहिले स्केलमा बाकस राख्नुहोस्। भाडा तौलका आधारमा निर्धारण गरिन्छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
ស្ត្រី៖ ខ្ញុំចង់ផ្ញើវាទៅប្រទេសនេប៉ាល់។ តើវានឹងត្រូវចំណាយច្រើនទេ?
បុរស៖ សូមដាក់ប្រអប់នៅលើមាត្រដ្ឋានជាមុនសិន។ តម្លៃត្រូវបានកំណត់ដោយទម្ងន់។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
කාන්තාව: මට මේක නේපාලයට යවන්න ඕන. ලොකු වියදමක් යයිද?
මිනිසා: කරුණාකර මුලින්ම පෙට්ටිය පරිමාණය මත තබන්න. ගාස්තුව තීරණය වන්නේ බර අනුව ය.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মহিলাঃ আমি এটা নেপালে পাঠাতে চাই। এটা অনেক খরচ হবে?
মানুষ: অনুগ্রহ করে প্রথমে বক্সটি স্কেলে রাখুন। ভাড়া ওজন দ্বারা নির্ধারিত হয়।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
အမျိုးသမီး- ဒါကို နီပေါကို ပို့ပေးချင်ပါတယ်။ အများကြီးကုန်ကျမှာလား။
Man: ကျေးဇူးပြု၍ ဘောက်စ်ကို စကေးပေါ်တွင် အရင်ချထားပါ။ ယာဉ်စီးခကို အလေးချိန်ဖြင့် ဆုံးဖြတ်သည်။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 저는 3년 동안 용접을 했습니다. 용접을 아주 잘해서 사장님이 재고용을 해주었습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Tôi đã làm công việc hàn trong 3 năm. Vì tôi hàn rất tốt nên giám đốc đã tái tuyển dụng tôi.
g_text_audio_translate.en: I've been welding for three years. I am very good at welding, so the boss rehired me.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Saldo da tre anni. Sono molto bravo a saldare, quindi il capo mi ha riassunto.

#######

I've been welding for three years. I am very good at welding, so the boss rehired me.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Je soude depuis trois ans. Je suis très bon en soudure, alors le patron m'a réembauché.

#######

I've been welding for three years. I am very good at welding, so the boss rehired me.

#######

I've been welding for three years. I am very good at welding, so the boss rehired me.

I've been welding for three years. I am very good at welding, so the boss rehired me.

I've been welding for three years. I am very good at welding, so the boss rehired me.

g_text_audio_translate.km: ខ្ញុំបានផ្សារដែកអស់រយៈពេលបីឆ្នាំមកហើយ។ ខ្ញុំពូកែផ្សារដែក ដូច្នេះថៅកែបានជួលខ្ញុំវិញ។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මම අවුරුදු තුනක් වෙල්ඩින් කරනවා. මම වෙල්ඩින් කරන්න හරිම දක්ෂයි, ඒ නිසා ලොක්කා මාව නැවත බඳවා ගත්තා.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমি তিন বছর ধরে ওয়েল্ডিং করছি। আমি ওয়েল্ডিংয়ে খুব ভালো, তাই বস আমাকে রিহায়ার করেছেন।
g_text_audio_translate.my: ကျွန်တော် ဂဟေဆက်တာ သုံးနှစ်ရှိပြီ။ ကျွန်တော်က ဂဟေဆက်တာ အရမ်းကောင်းတယ်ဆိုတော့ သူဌေးက ကျွန်တော့်ကို ပြန်ငှားတယ်။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio: 저는 사장님과 근로계약을 1년 하고 이번 달부터 가구공장에서 일하고 있습니다. 가구를 만드는 일이 힘들지만 재미있습니다.

g_text_audio_translate.vi: Tôi đã ký hợp đồng lao động với giám đốc 1 năm và từ tháng này tôi đã làm việc tại nhà máy đồ nội thất. Việc làm đồ nội thất tuy vất vả nhưng thú vị.
g_text_audio_translate.en: I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Ho firmato un contratto di lavoro di un anno con il capo e da questo mese lavoro in una fabbrica di mobili. Realizzare mobili è difficile ma divertente.

#######

I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
J'ai signé un contrat de travail d'un an avec le patron et je travaille dans une usine de meubles depuis ce mois-ci. Fabriquer des meubles est difficile mais amusant.

#######

I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Firmé un contrato laboral de un año con el jefe y trabajo en una fábrica de muebles desde este mes. Hacer muebles es difícil pero divertido.

#######

I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Saya menandatangani kontrak kerja satu tahun dengan bos dan telah bekerja di pabrik furnitur sejak bulan ini. Membuat furnitur itu sulit tapi menyenangkan.

#######

I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
私は上司と1年間の労働契約を結び、今月から家具工場で働いています。家具作りは大変だけど楽しいです。

#######

I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Ich habe mit dem Chef einen einjährigen Arbeitsvertrag unterschrieben und arbeite seit diesem Monat in einer Möbelfabrik. Möbel herzustellen ist schwierig, macht aber Spaß.

#######

I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
我和老板签了一年的劳动合同，从这个月开始就到家具厂上班了。制作家具很困难但很有趣。

#######

I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
我和老闆簽了一年的勞動合同，從這個月開始就到家具廠上班了。製作家具很困難但很有趣。

#######

I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Я подписал с начальником годовой трудовой договор и с этого месяца работаю на мебельной фабрике. Изготовление мебели – это сложно, но увлекательно.

#######

I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ฉันเซ็นสัญญาจ้างงานกับเจ้านาย 1 ปี และทำงานที่โรงงานเฟอร์นิเจอร์ตั้งแต่เดือนนี้ การทำเฟอร์นิเจอร์เป็นเรื่องยากแต่สนุก

#######

I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Assinei contrato de trabalho de um ano com o patrão e trabalho em uma fábrica de móveis desde este mês. Fazer móveis é difícil, mas divertido.

#######

I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
मैंने बॉस के साथ एक साल के श्रम अनुबंध पर हस्ताक्षर किए हैं और इस महीने से एक फर्नीचर कारखाने में काम कर रहा हूं। फ़र्निचर बनाना कठिन है लेकिन मज़ेदार है।

#######

I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Patronla bir yıllık iş sözleşmesi imzaladım ve bu aydan beri bir mobilya fabrikasında çalışıyorum. Mobilya yapmak zor ama eğlencelidir.

#######

I signed a one-year labor contract with the boss and have been working at a furniture factory since this month. Making furniture is hard but fun.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: मैले मालिकसँग एक वर्षको श्रम सम्झौतामा हस्ताक्षर गरें र यो महिनादेखि फर्निचर कारखानामा काम गरिरहेको छु। फर्निचर बनाउन गाह्रो तर रमाइलो छ।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ខ្ញុំបានចុះកិច្ចសន្យាការងាររយៈពេលមួយឆ្នាំជាមួយថៅកែ ហើយបានធ្វើការនៅរោងចក្រគ្រឿងសង្ហារឹមមួយចាប់តាំងពីខែនេះ។ ការ​ធ្វើ​គ្រឿង​សង្ហារិម​គឺ​ពិបាក ប៉ុន្តែ​សប្បាយ។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මම ලොක්කා සමඟ වසරක කම්කරු ගිවිසුමක් අත්සන් කර මේ මාසයේ සිට ගෘහ භාණ්ඩ කම්හලක වැඩ කරමි. ගෘහ භාණ්ඩ සෑදීම දුෂ්කර නමුත් විනෝදජනකයි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমি বসের সাথে এক বছরের শ্রম চুক্তি স্বাক্ষর করেছি এবং এই মাস থেকে একটি আসবাবপত্র কারখানায় কাজ করছি। আসবাবপত্র তৈরি করা কঠিন কিন্তু মজাদার।
g_text_audio_translate.my: သူဌေးနဲ့ တစ်နှစ် အလုပ်သမား စာချုပ်ချုပ်ပြီး ဒီလကတည်းက ပရိဘောဂ စက်ရုံမှာ အလုပ်ဝင်ခဲ့တယ်။ ပရိဘောဂလုပ်ရတာ ခက်ပေမယ့် ပျော်စရာကောင်းတယ်။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 한국 사람들은 인사를 할 때 어떻게 해요?
여자: 보통 고개를 숙여서 해요.
남자: 그럼 악수는요?
여자: 악수를 할 때도 고개를 숙이는 사람이 많아요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Người Hàn Quốc làm gì khi họ chào hỏi?
Nữ: Người ta thường cúi đầu.
Nam: Vậy còn bắt tay thì sao?
Nữ: Nhiều người cúi đầu cả khi họ bắt tay.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: What do Koreans do when they say hello?
Woman: They usually do it with their heads down.
Man: What about the handshake?
Woman: Many people bow their heads when shaking hands.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Cosa fanno i coreani quando salutano?
Donna: Di solito lo fanno a testa bassa.
Uomo: E la stretta di mano?
Donna: Molte persone chinano la testa quando stringono la mano.

#######

Man: What do Koreans do when they say hello?
Woman: They usually do it with their heads down.
Man: What about the handshake?
Woman: Many people bow their heads when shaking hands.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Que font les Coréens quand ils disent bonjour ?
Femme : Ils le font généralement la tête baissée.
Homme : Et la poignée de main ?
Femme : Beaucoup de gens baissent la tête lorsqu’ils se serrent la main.

#######

Man: What do Koreans do when they say hello?

Mujer: Suelen hacerlo con la cabeza gacha.
Hombre: ¿Qué pasa con el apretón de manos?
Mujer: Mucha gente inclina la cabeza cuando se dan la mano.

#######

Man: What do Koreans do when they say hello?

Wanita: Mereka biasanya melakukannya dengan kepala tertunduk.

Wanita: Banyak orang menundukkan kepala ketika berjabat tangan.

#######

Woman: They usually do it with their heads down.

女性: 彼らは通常、頭を下げてそれを行います。

女性：握手をするときに頭を下げる人が多いです。

#######

Man: What do Koreans do when they say hello?

g_text_audio_translate.de:

Frau: Normalerweise machen sie es mit gesenktem Kopf.

Frau: Viele Menschen neigen beim Händeschütteln den Kopf.

#######

Man: What do Koreans do when they say hello?
Woman: They usually do it with their heads down.

Woman: Many people bow their heads when shaking hands.

女：很多人握手時都是低頭的。

#######

Man: What do Koreans do when they say hello?
Woman: They usually do it with their heads down.
Man: What about the handshake?
Woman: Many people bow their heads when shaking hands.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Что делают корейцы, когда здороваются?
Женщина: Обычно они делают это, опустив голову.
Мужчина: А как насчет рукопожатия?
Женщина: Многие люди склоняют головы при рукопожатии.

Man: What do Koreans do when they say hello?
Woman: They usually do it with their heads down.

g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: คนเกาหลีทำอะไรเวลาทักทาย?
ผู้หญิง: ปกติแล้วพวกเธอจะก้มหัวลง

ผู้หญิง: หลายคนก้มศีรษะเมื่อจับมือกัน

#######

Man: What do Koreans do when they say hello?
Woman: They usually do it with their heads down.

g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: O que os coreanos fazem quando dizem olá?
Mulher: Geralmente fazem isso de cabeça baixa.
Homem: E o aperto de mão?
Mulher: Muitas pessoas baixam a cabeça quando apertam as mãos.

#######

Man: What do Koreans do when they say hello?
Woman: They usually do it with their heads down.
Man: What about the handshake?
Woman: Many people bow their heads when shaking hands.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: जब कोरियाई लोग नमस्ते कहते हैं तो वे क्या करते हैं?
महिला: वे आमतौर पर इसे अपना सिर नीचे करके करते हैं।
आदमी: हाथ मिलाने के बारे में क्या?
महिला: कई लोग हाथ मिलाते समय सिर झुका लेते हैं.

#######

Man: What do Koreans do when they say hello?
Woman: They usually do it with their heads down.

Woman: Many people bow their heads when shaking hands.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Koreliler merhaba dediklerinde ne yaparlar?
Kadın: Genelde başları eğik yapıyorlar.
Adam: Peki ya el sıkışma?
Kadın: Birçok insan el sıkışırken başlarını eğer.

#######

Man: What do Koreans do when they say hello?
Woman: They usually do it with their heads down.
Man: What about the handshake?
Woman: Many people bow their heads when shaking hands.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मानिस: कोरियालीहरूले नमस्कार गर्दा के गर्छन्?
महिला: तिनीहरू प्राय: टाउको तल राखेर गर्छन्।
मानिस: हात मिलाउने को बारे मा?
महिला: धेरै मानिसहरू हात मिलाउँदा टाउको झुकाउँछन्।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ តើជនជាតិកូរ៉េធ្វើអ្វីនៅពេលពួកគេនិយាយសួស្តី?
ស្ត្រី៖ ជាធម្មតាពួកគេធ្វើបែបនេះដោយក្បាលចុះក្រោម។
បុរស៖ ចុះការចាប់ដៃវិញ?
ស្ត្រី៖ មនុស្សជាច្រើនអោនក្បាលនៅពេលចាប់ដៃ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: කොරියානුවන් ආයුබෝවන් කිව්වම මොකද කරන්නේ?
කාන්තාව: ඔවුන් සාමාන්‍යයෙන් කරන්නේ හිස පහත් කරගෙන.
මිනිසා: අතට අත දීම ගැන කුමක් කිව හැකිද?
කාන්තාව: බොහෝ අය අතට අත දෙන විට හිස නමන්න.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মানুষ: কোরিয়ানরা হ্যালো বললে কি করে?
মহিলা: তারা সাধারণত মাথা নিচু করে এটি করে।
লোক: হ্যান্ডশেক সম্পর্কে কি?
মহিলাঃ অনেকেই করমর্দনের সময় মাথা নত করে।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
ယောက်ျား- ကိုရီးယားတွေက နှုတ်ဆက်ရင် ဘာလုပ်ကြလဲ။
အမျိုးသမီး- သူတို့က ခေါင်းငုံ့ပြီး လုပ်လေ့ရှိပါတယ်။
Man: လက်ဆွဲနှုတ်ဆက်တာကော။
အမျိုးသမီး- လက်ဆွဲနှုတ်ဆက်တဲ့အခါ လူတော်တော်များများက ခေါင်းငုံ့နေကြတယ်။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
여자: 오늘은 몇 시까지 열어요?
남자: 저녁 9시 50분까지 열어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nữ: Hôm nay mở cửa đến mấy giờ?
Nam: Mở cửa đến 9:50 tối.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Woman: Until what time is it open today?
Man: It's open until 9:50 p.m.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Donna: Fino a che ora è aperto oggi?
Uomo: È aperto fino alle 21:50.

#######

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 지금 6시인데 언제 퇴근할 거예요?
여자: 30분 후에 갈 거예요. 아직 일이 안 끝났어요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Bây giờ là 6 giờ, khi nào bạn sẽ tan làm?

g_text_audio_translate.en:

Woman: I'll go in half an hour. I'm not done with my work yet.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Sono le 6 adesso, quando finisci di lavorare?
Donna: Andrò tra mezz'ora. Non ho ancora finito il mio lavoro.

#######

Man: It's 6 o'clock now, when are you going to get off work?

Femme : J'y vais dans une demi-heure. Je n'ai pas encore fini mon travail.

Man: It's 6 o'clock now, when are you going to get off work?

महिला: म आधा घण्टामा जान्छु। मेरो काम अझै सकिएको छैन।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ ម៉ោង​៦​ហើយ តើ​ពេល​ណា​ទើប​ចេញ​ពី​ការងារ?
ស្ត្រី៖ ខ្ញុំនឹងទៅកន្លះម៉ោងទៀត។ ខ្ញុំមិនទាន់បញ្ចប់ការងាររបស់ខ្ញុំនៅឡើយទេ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: දැන් වෙලාව 6යි, ඔයා කවද්ද වැඩ ඇරිලා යන්නෙ?
කාන්තාව: මම පැය භාගයකින් යන්නම්. තවම මගේ වැඩ ඉවර නැහැ.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
লোক: এখন 6 টা বাজে, আপনি কখন কাজ থেকে ছুটিতে যাচ্ছেন?
মহিলাঃ আমি আধা ঘন্টা পরে যাব। আমার কাজ এখনো শেষ হয়নি।

ယောက်ျား : အခု 6 နာရီထိုးနေပြီ ဘယ်အချိန်က အလုပ်ဆင်းမှာလဲ ။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 한국에서는 집에 들어갈 때 신발을 벗지요?
여자: 네. 현관에서 신발을 벗고 거실에는 그냥 들어가요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Ở Hàn Quốc, người ta cởi giày khi vào nhà phải không?
Nữ: Đúng vậy. Người ta cởi giày khi ở cửa trước và rồi vào phòng khách.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: In Corea, le persone si tolgono le scarpe quando entrano in una casa?
Donna: Sì. La gente si toglie le scarpe all'ingresso e va in soggiorno.

#######

Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : En Corée, est-ce que les gens enlèvent leurs chaussures lorsqu'ils entrent dans une maison ?
Femme : Oui. Les gens enlèvent leurs chaussures à l’entrée et entrent simplement dans le salon.

#######

Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: En Corea, ¿la gente se quita los zapatos cuando entra a una casa?
Mujer: Sí. La gente se quita los zapatos en la entrada y simplemente entra al salón.

#######

Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Di Korea, apakah orang melepas sepatu saat memasuki rumah?
Wanita: Ya. Orang-orang melepas sepatu mereka di pintu masuk dan masuk ke ruang tamu.

#######

Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: 韓国では家に入るとき靴を脱ぎますか?
女性: はい。人々は玄関で靴を脱いでそのままリビングルームに入ります。

#######

Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Ziehen die Menschen in Korea ihre Schuhe aus, wenn sie ein Haus betreten?
Frau: Ja. Am Eingang ziehen die Leute ihre Schuhe aus und gehen einfach ins Wohnzimmer.

#######

Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：在韩国，人们进屋要脱鞋吗？
女：是的。人们在入口处脱掉鞋子，直接走进客厅。

#######

Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：在韓國，人們進屋要脫鞋嗎？
女：是的。人們在入口處脫掉鞋子，直接走進客廳。

#######

Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: В Корее люди снимают обувь, входя в дом?
Женщина: Да. Люди разуваются у входа и просто заходят в гостиную.

#######

Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ที่เกาหลี ผู้คนถอดรองเท้าเมื่อเข้าไปในบ้านหรือเปล่า?
ผู้หญิง: ใช่. ผู้คนถอดรองเท้าที่ทางเข้าแล้วเข้าไปในห้องนั่งเล่น

#######

Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Na Coreia, as pessoas tiram os sapatos quando entram em casa?
Mulher: Sim. As pessoas tiram os sapatos na entrada e simplesmente vão para a sala.

#######

Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: कोरिया में, क्या लोग घर में प्रवेश करते समय अपने जूते उतारते हैं?
महिला: हाँ. लोग प्रवेश द्वार पर अपने जूते उतार देते हैं और लिविंग रूम में चले जाते हैं।

#######

Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Kore'de insanlar eve girerken ayakkabılarını çıkarırlar mı?
Kadın: Evet. İnsanlar girişte ayakkabılarını çıkarıp oturma odasına giriyorlar.

#######

Man: In Korea, do people take off their shoes when they enter a house?
Woman: Yes. People take off their shoes at the entrance and just go into the living room.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मानिस: कोरियामा, के मानिसहरू घर पस्दा जुत्ता फुकाल्छन्?
महिला: हो। मानिसहरू प्रवेशद्वारमा जुत्ता फुकाल्छन् र बस्ने कोठामा जान्छन्।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ នៅ​កូរ៉េ​មាន​មនុស្ស​ដោះ​ស្បែកជើង​ពេល​ចូល​ផ្ទះ​ទេ?
ស្ត្រី៖ បាទ។ មនុស្ស​ដោះ​ស្បែក​ជើង​នៅ​ច្រក​ចូល ហើយ​ចូល​ទៅ​ក្នុង​បន្ទប់។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: කොරියාවේ මිනිසුන් නිවසකට ඇතුළු වූ විට සපත්තු ගලවනවාද?
කාන්තාව: ඔව්. මිනිසුන් ඇතුල් වන ස්ථානයේ සපත්තු ගලවා සාලයට යති.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মানুষ: কোরিয়াতে, লোকেরা ঘরে ঢুকলে কি জুতা খুলে ফেলে?
মহিলাঃ হ্যাঁ। লোকেরা প্রবেশদ্বারে তাদের জুতা খুলে বসার ঘরে যায়।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
ယောက်ျား- ကိုရီးယားမှာ အိမ်ထဲဝင်ရင် ဖိနပ်ချွတ်ကြလား။
အမျိုးသမီး : ဟုတ်တယ်။ လူတွေက ဝင်ပေါက်မှာ ဖိနပ်ချွတ်ပြီး ဧည့်ခန်းထဲကို ဝင်သွားကြတယ်။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 아줌마, 수박 한 통에 얼마예요?
여자: 수박은 한 통에 15,000원이에요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Dì ơi, dưa hấu bao nhiêu một trái vậy ạ?
Nữ: Dưa hấu 15.000 won một trái.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Quanto costa un'anguria, signora?
Donna: L'anguria costa 15.000 won l'una.

#######

Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Combien coûte une pastèque, madame ?
Femme : La pastèque coûte 15 000 won pièce.

#######

Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: ¿Cuánto cuesta una sandía, señora?
Mujer: La sandía cuesta 15.000 wones cada una.

#######

Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria : Berapa harga buah semangka, Bu?
Wanita: Semangka harganya masing-masing 15.000 won.

#######

Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男: スイカはいくらですか、奥さん?
女性: スイカは1個15,000ウォンです。

#######

Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Wie viel kostet eine Wassermelone, Ma'am?
Frau: Wassermelone kostet jeweils 15.000 Won.

#######

Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：女士，一个西瓜多少钱？
女：西瓜一个15000韩元。

#######

Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：女士，一個西瓜多少錢？
女：西瓜一個15000韓元。

#######

Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Сколько стоит арбуз, мэм?
Женщина: Арбуз стоит 15 000 вон за штуку.

#######

Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย : แตงโมราคาเท่าไรครับคุณผู้หญิง?
ผู้หญิง: แตงโม ราคาตัวละ 15,000 วอน

#######

Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Quanto custa uma melancia, senhora?
Mulher: A melancia custa 15.000 won cada.

#######

Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: एक तरबूज़ कितने का है मैडम?
महिला: तरबूज़ की कीमत 15,000 जीत है।

#######

Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Karpuz ne kadar hanımefendi?
Kadın: Karpuzun tanesi 15.000 won.

#######

Man: How much is a watermelon, ma'am?
Woman: Watermelon costs 15,000 won each.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मानिस: तरबूज कति हो महोदय ?
महिला: तरबूजको लागत प्रत्येक 15,000 वोन।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ ឪឡឹក​តម្លៃ​ប៉ុន្មាន​លោក​ស្រី?
ស្ត្រី៖ ឪឡឹកមានតម្លៃ ១៥,០០០វ៉ុន ក្នុង១ផ្លែ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: කොමඩු ගෙඩියක් කීයද නෝනා?
කාන්තාව: කොමඩු ගෙඩියක් වොන් 15,000 බැගින්.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
মানুষ: তরমুজের দাম কত, ম্যাম?
মহিলা: তরমুজের প্রতিটির দাম 15,000 ওয়ান।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
ယောက်ျား: ဖရဲသီးဘယ်လောက်လဲ ဆရာမ။
အမျိုးသမီး- ဖရဲသီးတစ်လုံးလျှင် ဝမ် ၁၅၀၀၀ ကုန်ကျသည်။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 돈 좀 바꿔주세요. 오늘 1달러에 얼마예요?
여자: 1달러에 1,300원이에요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi muốn đổi tiền ạ. Hôm nay 1 đô la là bao nhiêu vậy?
Nữ: 1.300 won một đô la.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: Voglio scambiare soldi. Quanto vale un dollaro oggi?
Donna: Sono 1.300 won per un dollaro.

#######

Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : Je veux échanger de l'argent. Combien coûte un dollar aujourd’hui ?
Femme : C'est 1 300 wons pour un dollar.

#######

Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: Quiero cambiar dinero. ¿Cuánto vale un dólar hoy?
Mujer: Son 1.300 wones por dólar.

#######

Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Saya ingin menukarkan uang. Berapa satu dolar hari ini?
Wanita: Harganya 1.300 won untuk satu dolar.

#######

Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: お金を両替したいのですが。今日の1ドルはいくらですか?
女性: 1ドル1,300ウォンです。

#######

Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Ich möchte Geld tauschen. Wie viel kostet heute ein Dollar?
Frau: Ein Dollar kostet 1.300 Won.

#######

Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：我想换钱。今天一美元多少钱？
女：1美元1300韩元。

#######

Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：我想換錢。今天一美元多少錢？
女：1美元1300韓元。

#######

Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Я хочу обменять деньги. Сколько стоит доллар сегодня?
Женщина: Это 1300 вон за доллар.

#######

Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ฉันอยากแลกเงิน วันนี้หนึ่งดอลลาร์เป็นเท่าไหร่?
ผู้หญิง: 1 ดอลลาร์ละ 1,300 วอน

#######

Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Quero trocar dinheiro. Quanto custa um dólar hoje?
Mulher: São 1.300 won por um dólar.

#######

Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: मुझे पैसे बदलने हैं. आज एक डॉलर कितना है?
महिला: यह एक डॉलर के लिए 1,300 जीते हैं।

#######

Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Para bozdurmak istiyorum. Bugün bir dolar ne kadar?
Kadın: Bir doların karşılığı 1.300 won.

#######

Man: I want to exchange money. How much is a dollar today?
Woman: It's 1,300 won for a dollar.
g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मान्छे: म पैसा साट्न चाहन्छु। आज डलरको भाउ कति ?
महिला: यो एक डलरको लागि 1,300 वोन हो।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ ខ្ញុំចង់ដូរលុយ។ តើ​មួយ​ដុល្លារ​ថ្ងៃ​នេះ​ប៉ុន្មាន?
ស្ត្រី៖ វាគឺ 1,300 វ៉ុនសម្រាប់មួយដុល្លារ។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: මට මුදල් හුවමාරු කිරීමට අවශ්‍යයි. අද ඩොලරයක් කීයද?
කාන්තාව: එය ඩොලරයට වොන් 1,300 කි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
লোক: আমি টাকা বিনিময় করতে চাই. আজ এক ডলারের দাম কত?
মহিলা: এটা এক ডলারের জন্য 1,300 ওয়ান।

I am buying fruits at the market now. I want to buy apples and pears.
g_text_audio_translate.ne: अहिले बजारमा फलफुल किन्दै छु । म स्याउ र नाशपाती किन्न चाहन्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km: ពេលនេះខ្ញុំកំពុងទិញផ្លែឈើនៅផ្សារ។ ខ្ញុំចង់ទិញផ្លែប៉ោម និងផ្លែទទឹម។
g_text_audio_translate.si: මම දැන් වෙළඳපොලේ පලතුරු මිලදී ගන්නවා. මට ඇපල් සහ පෙයාර්ස් මිලදී ගැනීමට අවශ්‍යයි.
g_text_audio_translate.bn: আমি এখন বাজারে ফল কিনছি। আমি আপেল এবং নাশপাতি কিনতে চাই.
g_text_audio_translate.my: အခု ဈေးမှာ သစ်သီးတွေ ဝယ်နေတယ်။ ပန်းသီးနဲ့ သစ်တော်သီးတွေ ဝယ်ချင်တယ်။

title: 잘 듣고 들은 내용과 관계있는 그림을 고르십시오.

general.g_text_audio:
남자: 배가 고픈데 뭐 먹을 거 좀 있어요?
여자: 네. 빵도 있고 김밥도 있는데요.
남자: 그럼 빵 좀 주세요.

g_text_audio_translate.vi:
Nam: Tôi đói quá, có gì để ăn không?
Nữ: Có. Có cả bánh mì và cả kimbap.
Nam: Vậy thì cho tôi ít bánh mì.
g_text_audio_translate.en:
Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.
Man: Then I'll have some bread.
g_text_audio_translate.it:
Uomo: ho fame. Hai qualcosa da mangiare?
Donna: Sì. Ho pane e kimbap.
Uomo: Allora prenderò del pane.

#######

Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.
Man: Then I'll have some bread.
g_text_audio_translate.fr:
Homme : J'ai faim. As-tu quelque chose à manger ?
Femme : Oui. J'ai du pain et du kimbap.
Homme : Alors je prendrai du pain.

#######

Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.
Man: Then I'll have some bread.
g_text_audio_translate.es:
Hombre: tengo hambre. ¿Tienes algo para comer?
Mujer: Sí. Tengo pan y kimbap.
Hombre: Entonces tomaré un poco de pan.

#######

Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.
Man: Then I'll have some bread.
g_text_audio_translate.id:
Pria: Saya lapar. Apakah kamu punya sesuatu untuk dimakan?
Wanita: Ya. Saya punya roti dan kimbap.
Pria: Kalau begitu, aku akan pesan roti.

#######

Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.
Man: Then I'll have some bread.
g_text_audio_translate.ja:
男性: お腹が空いたよ。何か食べるものはありますか？
女性: はい。パンとキンパがあります。
男: それならパンを食べます。

#######

Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.
Man: Then I'll have some bread.
g_text_audio_translate.de:
Mann: Ich habe Hunger. Hast du etwas zu essen?
Frau: Ja. Ich habe Brot und Kimbap.
Mann: Dann esse ich etwas Brot.

#######

Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.
Man: Then I'll have some bread.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-CN:
男：我饿了。你有什么吃的吗？
女：是的。我有面包和紫菜包饭。
男：那我就吃点面包吧。

#######

Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.
Man: Then I'll have some bread.
g_text_audio_translate.zh-TW:
男：我餓了。你有什麼吃的嗎？
女：是的。我有麵包和紫菜包飯。
男：那我就吃點麵包吧。

#######

Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.
Man: Then I'll have some bread.
g_text_audio_translate.ru:
Мужчина: Я голоден. У вас есть что-нибудь поесть?
Женщина: Да. У меня есть хлеб и кимбап.
Мужчина: Тогда мне будет немного хлеба.

#######

Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.
Man: Then I'll have some bread.
g_text_audio_translate.th:
ผู้ชาย: ฉันหิว. คุณมีอะไรกินบ้างไหม?
ผู้หญิง: ใช่. ฉันมีขนมปังและคิมบับ
ผู้ชาย: งั้นฉันจะกินขนมปัง

#######

Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.
Man: Then I'll have some bread.
g_text_audio_translate.pt:
Homem: Estou com fome. Você tem alguma coisa para comer?
Mulher: Sim. Eu tenho pão e kimbap.
Homem: Então vou comer um pouco de pão.

#######

Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.
Man: Then I'll have some bread.
g_text_audio_translate.hi:
आदमी: मुझे भूख लगी है. क्या आपके पास खाने के लिए कुछ है?
महिला: हाँ. मेरे पास रोटी और किंबप है।
आदमी: तो फिर मैं कुछ रोटी लूंगा।

#######

Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.
Man: Then I'll have some bread.
g_text_audio_translate.tr:
Adam: Açım. Yiyecek bir şeyin var mı?
Kadın: Evet. Ekmeğim ve kimbapım var.
Adam: O zaman biraz ekmek alacağım.

#######

Man: I'm hungry. Do you have anything to eat?
Woman: Yes. I have bread and kimbap.

g_text_audio_translate.ne:
मान्छे: मलाई भोक लागेको छ। के तपाईसँग खानेकुरा छ?
महिला: हो। मसँग रोटी र किम्बाप छ।
मानिस: त्यसो भए म केही रोटी लिन्छु।
g_text_audio_translate.km:
បុរស៖ ខ្ញុំឃ្លាន។ តើអ្នកមានអ្វីបរិភោគទេ?
ស្ត្រី៖ បាទ។ ខ្ញុំមាននំបុ័ង និងគីមបាប់។
បុរស៖ បន្ទាប់មកខ្ញុំនឹងមាននំប៉័ង។
g_text_audio_translate.si:
මිනිසා: මට බඩගිනියි. ඔබට කන්න යමක් තිබේද?
කාන්තාව: ඔව්. මට පාන් සහ කිම්බාප් තියෙනවා.
මිනිසා: එහෙනම් මම පාන් ටිකක් ගන්නම්.
g_text_audio_translate.bn:
লোক: আমি ক্ষুধার্ত. তোমার কি খাওয়ার কিছু আছে?
মহিলাঃ হ্যাঁ। আমার কাছে রুটি আর কিম্বাপ আছে।
লোক: তাহলে আমি কিছু রুটি খাব।
g_text_audio_translate.my:
Man: ငါဗိုက်ဆာတယ်။ စားစရာရှိလား
အမျိုးသမီး : ဟုတ်တယ်။ ငါ့မှာ ပေါင်မုန့် နဲ့ Kimbap ရှိတယ်။
ယောက်ျား : ဒါဆို ငါမုန့်သွားယူမယ်။
